variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 517 Hygroscopic Breathers | Replaces the MP Filtri SAW115-3G03A00P01
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 517 Hygroscopic Breathers is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SAW115-3G03A00P01. Easy to install and replace, the FS 517 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
